title: 环境配置
content:
WSL2 Install Ubuntu-18.04wsl -l -owsl --install -d Ubuntu-18.04
因为wsl -l -o的发行版没有16.04的Ubuntu
change source.listsudo nano /etc/apt/sources.list# 18.04 清华源deb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ bionic main restricted universe multiversedeb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ bionic-updates main restricted universe multiversedeb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ bionic-backports main restricted universe multiversedeb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ bionic-security main restricted universe multiverse# updatesudo apt updatesudo apt upgrade
Toolchainsudo apt-get install -y build-essential gdbsudo apt-get install -y gcc-multilib
qemusudo apt install -y libpixman-1-dev pkg-config zlib1g-dev libglib2.0-dev pythongit clone https://github.com/mit-pdos/6.828-qemu.git qemucd qemu./configure --disable-kvm --target-list="i386-softmmu x86_64-softmmu"
QEMU will install to /usr/local by default
Q&A：● VSCODE-WSL2的写权限：
sudo chown -R $USER /home
● make errorhttps://github.com/woai3c/MIT6.828/blob/master/docs/install.md● make sucess
qemu-system-i386 --versionQEMU emulator version 2.3.0, Copyright (c) 2003-2008 Fabrice Bellard
Reference:https://pdos.csail.mit.edu/6.828/2018/tools.html
